name: Stickman Miner
description: Embark on a lucrative journey beneath the earth in Stickman Idle Miner, a captivating mining simulator. Start with a humble pickaxe, chip away at mineral-rich veins, and uncover a variety of ores including coal, iron, gold, and diamonds. Sell the resources to make money.. Refine raw minerals into valuable products to sell at peak prices. Expand your empire, upgrade your tools, grow your facilities, and transform your small enterprise into a global mining powerhouse.
